channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The improved battery-powered Starlink Mini is here
item.description: My Starlink Mini has radically changed the way I live. It's the biggest reason I can work remotely from my converted van, providing fast and reliable internet in places that traditional 4G and 5G data signals don't reach. Peakdo's latest LinkPower battery makes the smallest Starlink terminal even better by setting it free from power […]

item.title: Secure your spring break travels with Mullvad VPN — it's the simplest VPN deal I've ever seen
item.description: There's no long term subscriptions, sneaky price hikes, or complicated tax rates with this one

item.title: Fnac est de retour avec les offres bonifiées sur ses cartes Fnac+ Jackpots pour avoir jusqu’à 90 € offerts dans votre cagnotte
item.description: C'est une offre qui revient de façon régulière mais qui a toujours son petit succès : en souscrivant une carte Fnac+, vous pouvez avoir 30, 60 ou 90 euros offerts dans votre cagnotte, seulement pour le prix de la carte.

item.title: How to watch Milan-San Remo 2026: Free Streams, TV Channels & Start Time
item.description: All the ways to watch Milano-Sanremo 2026 live streams online and from anywhere as Tadej Pogačar renews rivalries with Mathieu van der Poel.
